name: L-Racers
short_description: L-Racers is a minimalistic, retro, 1980s arcade-style old school game where you go head-to-head against another player (CPU or human) and be the last racer alive.
detailed_description:
L-Racers is a minimalistic, retro, 1980s arcade-style old school game where you go head-to-head against another player (CPU or human) and be the last racer alive.

Use your keyboard or an XInput-compatible gamepad, grab a friend and play like it's 1985!

Available game modes include: Single player versus CPU, 2-Player local PvP sharing the same keyboard, or both using gamepads, and Local Area Network play.

As of version 2.0, L-RACERS now have SPECIAL POWERS, including stopping on a dime, dashing at double speed, or laying explosive bombs for your opponent!
